case_title: AL BOWIE VS. ANDRE CHARLES et al

RETURN MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT
SC-108 FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, SHARIKA TYRIESE

ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THIS JUDGMENT RESULTS FROM A MOTOR VEHICLE ACCIDENT ON A CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY AND WAS CAUSED BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S OPERATION OF A MOTOR VEHICLE. IF THE JUDGMENT IS NOT PAID, JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY APPLY TO HAVE THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DRIVERS' LICENSE SUSPENDED. -JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL-
SC-108 - ANSWER FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT CHARLES, ANDRE
